description: list installable skills from a GitHub repo path (read-only, JSON)
rules: read-only — only reads a repo's directory listing via the GitHub contents API
defaults to openai/skills skills/.curated on ref main
skills list (JSON, with installed annotation) written to record_store
usage: Set REPO (owner/repo), SKILL_PATH (repo subdir to list), REF (branch/tag). Output: skills.json.
limitation: Read-only: never installs. Reaches the GitHub API; degrades to an empty list offline.
